description_long: This is a pair of classic oxford-style shoes featuring a two-tone design with white uppers and brown leather accents on the toe caps, heels, and soles. The shoes have a brogue pattern along the seams and toe caps, adding a touch of elegance and vintage flair. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with eyelets running up the vamp, and the laces appear slightly worn. The shoes show visible signs of use, with some creasing and scuff marks on the leather, especially around the toe and sides. The interior is lined with a darker material, likely leather or synthetic, and the soles are flat with minimal tread visible. These shoes are suitable for urban environments, such as city streets or sidewalks, and would typically be worn for formal or semi-formal occasions.
description: A pair of two-tone oxford shoes with white uppers and brown leather toe caps and heels, featuring brogue detailing and standard lacing. The shoes show signs of wear and are designed for formal or semi-formal urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical two-tone design, brogue toe caps, and standard criss-cross lacing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the white upper, brown toe and heel, and visible creasing along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the brown leather heels and the seam running up the back of each shoe.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the brogue detailing, scuff marks, and the overall profile of the shoe.
